objective: Update opencodex documentation (README x3 languages + docs-site) for the multi-agent v2 prompt-injection feature set shipped in v2.7.2/v2.7.3: injection model/effort designation, subagentModels roster with catalog-honest effort ladders, v2 collab surface detection (incl. responses_lite additional_tools), <=700-char v2 guidance, injectionPrompt {{model}}/{{effort}}/{{roster}} override, v1 Proactive-only. Verify docs-site build + root tests, single docs-only commit pushed to origin/main.

criteria.scenario: guidance-injection logs appear ONLY when the injection debug flag is on (GUI checkbox/API/CLI); default silent
criteria.expectedEvidence: unit test: multiAgentGuidance log gated; bun test summary 0 fail; manual flag flip via /api/debug
criteria.capturedEvidence: bun test ./tests/ => 1926 pass 0 fail; tsc root+gui clean; injection logs gated behind isInjectionDebugEnabled() (default OFF, env OCX_INJECTION_DEBUG); /api/debug injection PUT/reset roundtrip test in tests/api-debug.test.ts; GUI Debug.tsx 3rd toggle + i18n en/ko/zh/de; ocx debug injection CLI scope

criteria.scenario: EN docs describe all five features (injection model/effort, roster, v2 surface, injectionPrompt, v1 Proactive-only)
